prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot predict future stock prices with certainty. Stock markets are influenced by numerous complex and unpredictable factors, and past performance is not indicative of future results. The point estimate is set to the current price ($919.23), as it is the most neutral prediction in the absence of any predictive power for short-term market movements. The confidence intervals are constructed symmetrically around this point estimate, reflecting a plausible range of daily price fluctuations based on generalized assumptions of market volatility for a 1-day period. Higher confidence levels correspond to wider ranges to account for greater uncertainty.
